title: Ukraine turns real-life kills into video game thrills for drone pilots
summary_full: Kyiv says the Army of Drones Bonus system, in which points may be redeemed for weapons, is the first of its kind anywhere.
summary_public: Kyiv says the Army of Drones Bonus system, in which points may be redeemed for weapons, is the first of its kind anywhere.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: Ukraine turns real-life kills into video game thrills for drone pilots
